name: Data Ingestion — All Sources (HubSpot, ChargeHub, PayEngine, Skool, FX)

parameters.pythonCode:
import json
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone

results = []

for item in _items:
    props = item["json"].get("properties", item["json"])
    hs_id = str(item["json"].get("id", ""))
    email = (props.get("email", "") or "").strip().lower()
    if not email:
        continue

    contributor_id = str(uuid.uuid5(uuid.NAMESPACE_DNS, email))
    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()

    row = {
        # Contributor
        "contributor_id": contributor_id,
        "display_name": f"{props.get('firstname', '')} {props.get('lastname', '')}".strip() or email,
        # Identifier (email)
        "identifier_type": "email",
        "identifier_value": email,
        "id_source_system": "hubspot",
        # Identifier (hubspot_contact_id)
        "hs_contact_id": hs_id,
        # Membership snapshot
        "hubspot_membership_id": props.get("membership_id", "") or "",
        "tier_name": props.get("membership_tier", "") or "",
        "mrr": props.get("membership_mrr", "") or "",
        "mrr_currency": props.get("membership_currency", "") or "",
        "billing_source": props.get("membership_billing_source", "") or "",
        "billing_date": props.get("membership_billing_date", "") or "",
        "status": props.get("membership_status", "") or "",
        "membership_type": props.get("membership_type", "") or "",
        "created_at": props.get("membership_create_date", now) or now
    }
    results.append({"json": row})

return results if results else [{"json": {"_skip": True}}]

parameters.query:
=-- Upsert contributor
INSERT INTO contributors (contributor_id, display_name, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.contributor_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ ($json.display_name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (contributor_id) DO UPDATE
SET display_name = EXCLUDED.display_name, updated_at = NOW();

-- Upsert email identifier
INSERT INTO contributor_identifiers (contributor_id, identifier_type, identifier_value, source_system, is_primary)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.contributor_id }}'::uuid,
  'email',
  '{{ $json.identifier_value }}',
  'hubspot',
  TRUE
)
ON CONFLICT (identifier_type, identifier_value, source_system) DO NOTHING;

-- Upsert HubSpot contact ID identifier
INSERT INTO contributor_identifiers (contributor_id, identifier_type, identifier_value, source_system)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.contributor_id }}'::uuid,
  'hubspot_contact_id',
  '{{ $json.hs_contact_id }}',
  'hubspot'
)
ON CONFLICT (identifier_type, identifier_value, source_system) DO NOTHING;

-- Insert membership snapshot (immutable — new row per sync)
INSERT INTO memberships (
  contributor_id, hubspot_membership_id, hubspot_contact_id,
  tier_name, mrr, mrr_currency, billing_source, billing_date,
  status, membership_type, created_at
)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.contributor_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $json.hubspot_membership_id }}',
  '{{ $json.hs_contact_id }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.tier_name }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.mrr }}', '')::NUMERIC,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.mrr_currency }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.billing_source }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.billing_date }}', '')::DATE,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.status }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.membership_type }}', ''),
  '{{ $json.created_at }}'::TIMESTAMPTZ
WHERE '{{ $json.hubspot_membership_id }}' != '';

nodes.name: ChargeHub Charge Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives charge.processed events from ChargeHub. Same transform + persist pattern as PayEngine (Path 3).

parameters.pythonCode:
import json
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

body = _items[0]["json"].get("body", _items[0]["json"])

charge_id = body.get("charge_id", "")
email = (body.get("email", "") or "").strip().lower()
processed_at = body.get("processed_at", datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat())
line_item = body.get("line_item", "")
total_price = float(body.get("total_price", 0) or 0)
currency = body.get("currency", "USD")

# Convert to PST
try:
    pst = timezone(timedelta(hours=-8))
    dt = datetime.fromisoformat(processed_at.replace("Z", "+00:00"))
    processed_at_pst = dt.astimezone(pst).isoformat()
except Exception:
    processed_at_pst = processed_at

# Non-USD normalization via tier lookup (from reconcile.py)
TIER_USD = {"starter": 750, "pro": 2500, "executive": 6000, "executive annual": 24000}
normalized_usd = total_price
if currency.upper() != "USD":
    normalized_usd = TIER_USD.get(line_item.lower().strip(), total_price)

billing_period = processed_at_pst[:7] if len(processed_at_pst) >= 7 else processed_at[:7]
contributor_id = str(uuid.uuid5(uuid.NAMESPACE_DNS, email)) if email else None

return [{"json": {
    "source_system": "chargehub",
    "event_type": "charge_processed",
    "source_event_id": charge_id,
    "event_timestamp": processed_at,
    "payload": json.dumps(body),
    "contributor_id": contributor_id,
    "email": email,
    "processed_at": processed_at,
    "processed_at_pst": processed_at_pst,
    "tier_name": line_item,
    "presentment_amount": total_price,
    "presentment_currency": currency,
    "usd_amount": total_price if currency.upper() == "USD" else None,
    "normalized_usd": normalized_usd,
    "billing_period": billing_period
}}]

parameters.query:
=-- Insert raw billing event (immutable, deduped)
INSERT INTO raw_billing_events (
  source_system, event_type, source_event_id,
  event_timestamp, payload
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.source_system }}',
  '{{ $json.event_type }}',
  '{{ $json.source_event_id }}',
  '{{ $json.event_timestamp }}'::TIMESTAMPTZ,
  '{{ $json.payload }}'::JSONB
)
ON CONFLICT (source_system, source_event_id) DO NOTHING;

-- Insert transformed charge row
INSERT INTO charges (
  raw_event_id, contributor_id, source_system, source_charge_id,
  email, processed_at, processed_at_pst, tier_name,
  presentment_amount, presentment_currency, usd_amount,
  normalized_usd, billing_period
)
SELECT
  (SELECT event_id FROM raw_billing_events WHERE source_system = '{{ $json.source_system }}' AND source_event_id = '{{ $json.source_event_id }}'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.contributor_id }}', 'None')::UUID,
  '{{ $json.source_system }}',
  '{{ $json.source_event_id }}',
  '{{ $json.email }}',
  '{{ $json.processed_at }}'::TIMESTAMPTZ,
  '{{ $json.processed_at_pst }}'::TIMESTAMPTZ,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.tier_name }}', ''),
  {{ $json.presentment_amount || 0 }},
  '{{ $json.presentment_currency }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.usd_amount }}', 'None')::NUMERIC,
  {{ $json.normalized_usd || 0 }},
  '{{ $json.billing_period }}'
ON CONFLICT (source_system, source_charge_id) DO NOTHING;

nodes.name: PayEngine Charge Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives charge.processed events from PayEngine. Same dedup + persist pattern as ChargeHub (Path 2), only source_system and field mapping differ.

parameters.pythonCode:
import json
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

body = _items[0]["json"].get("body", _items[0]["json"])

# PayEngine uses different field names than ChargeHub
charge_id = body.get("transaction_id", body.get("charge_id", ""))
email = (body.get("customer_email", body.get("email", "")) or "").strip().lower()
processed_at = body.get("created_at", body.get("processed_at", datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()))
line_item = body.get("product_name", body.get("line_item", ""))
total_price = float(body.get("amount", body.get("total_price", 0)) or 0)
currency = body.get("currency", "USD")

# Convert to PST
try:
    pst = timezone(timedelta(hours=-8))
    dt = datetime.fromisoformat(processed_at.replace("Z", "+00:00"))
    processed_at_pst = dt.astimezone(pst).isoformat()
except Exception:
    processed_at_pst = processed_at

TIER_USD = {"starter": 750, "pro": 2500, "executive": 6000, "executive annual": 24000}
normalized_usd = total_price
if currency.upper() != "USD":
    normalized_usd = TIER_USD.get(line_item.lower().strip(), total_price)

billing_period = processed_at_pst[:7] if len(processed_at_pst) >= 7 else processed_at[:7]
contributor_id = str(uuid.uuid5(uuid.NAMESPACE_DNS, email)) if email else None

return [{"json": {
    "source_system": "payengine",
    "event_type": "charge_processed",
    "source_event_id": charge_id,
    "event_timestamp": processed_at,
    "payload": json.dumps(body),
    "contributor_id": contributor_id,
    "email": email,
    "processed_at": processed_at,
    "processed_at_pst": processed_at_pst,
    "tier_name": line_item,
    "presentment_amount": total_price,
    "presentment_currency": currency,
    "usd_amount": total_price if currency.upper() == "USD" else None,
    "normalized_usd": normalized_usd,
    "billing_period": billing_period
}}]

nodes.name: Transform PayEngine → Raw Event + Charge
nodes.notes: Same logic as ChargeHub transform but maps PayEngine field names (transaction_id, customer_email, amount, product_name) to the unified schema.

nodes.name: Skool Pull Schedule (Daily 6AM)
nodes.notes: Skool has no webhooks — daily pull is the only option. Runs at 6 AM PST, before the 8 AM reconciliation window.

nodes.name: Get Skool Cursor
nodes.notes: Reads the last successful pull timestamp from pipeline_state. Falls back to 48 hours ago on first run.

nodes.name: Skool — Fetch Transactions
nodes.notes: Placeholder — actual Skool API endpoint and auth will be configured when credentials are provisioned. Uses cursor_ts from previous node to only fetch new transactions.

parameters.pythonCode:
import json
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

results = []
max_ts = ""

for item in _items:
    txn = item["json"]
    # Skool transaction fields (adapt to actual API response)
    charge_id = txn.get("id", txn.get("transaction_id", ""))
    email = (txn.get("email", txn.get("member_email", "")) or "").strip().lower()
    processed_at = txn.get("created_at", txn.get("processed_at", datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()))
    line_item = txn.get("plan_name", txn.get("line_item", ""))
    total_price = float(txn.get("amount", txn.get("total_price", 0)) or 0)
    currency = txn.get("currency", "USD")

    if not email or not charge_id:
        continue

    # Track latest timestamp for cursor update
    if processed_at > max_ts:
        max_ts = processed_at

    # Convert to PST
    try:
        pst = timezone(timedelta(hours=-8))
        dt = datetime.fromisoformat(processed_at.replace("Z", "+00:00"))
        processed_at_pst = dt.astimezone(pst).isoformat()
    except Exception:
        processed_at_pst = processed_at

    TIER_USD = {"starter": 750, "pro": 2500, "executive": 6000, "executive annual": 24000}
    normalized_usd = total_price
    if currency.upper() != "USD":
        normalized_usd = TIER_USD.get(line_item.lower().strip(), total_price)

    billing_period = processed_at_pst[:7] if len(processed_at_pst) >= 7 else processed_at[:7]
    contributor_id = str(uuid.uuid5(uuid.NAMESPACE_DNS, email))

    results.append({"json": {
        "source_system": "skool",
        "event_type": "charge_processed",
        "source_event_id": charge_id,
        "event_timestamp": processed_at,
        "payload": json.dumps(txn),
        "contributor_id": contributor_id,
        "email": email,
        "processed_at": processed_at,
        "processed_at_pst": processed_at_pst,
        "tier_name": line_item,
        "presentment_amount": total_price,
        "presentment_currency": currency,
        "usd_amount": total_price if currency.upper() == "USD" else None,
        "normalized_usd": normalized_usd,
        "billing_period": billing_period,
        "_cursor_ts": max_ts
    }})

return results if results else [{"json": {"_skip": True, "_cursor_ts": max_ts}}]

nodes.name: Transform Skool → Raw Events + Charges
nodes.notes: Batch transform: loops through all Skool transactions, converts to the unified charge schema. Tracks max timestamp for cursor update.

INSERT INTO raw_billing_events (
  source_system, event_type, source_event_id,
  event_timestamp, payload
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.source_system }}',
  '{{ $json.event_type }}',
  '{{ $json.source_event_id }}',
  '{{ $json.event_timestamp }}'::TIMESTAMPTZ,
  '{{ $json.payload }}'::JSONB
)
ON CONFLICT (source_system, source_event_id) DO NOTHING;

-- Insert transformed charge row
INSERT INTO charges (
  raw_event_id, contributor_id, source_system, source_charge_id,
  email, processed_at, processed_at_pst, tier_name,
  presentment_amount, presentment_currency, usd_amount,
  normalized_usd, billing_period
)
SELECT
  (SELECT event_id FROM raw_billing_events WHERE source_system = '{{ $json.source_system }}' AND source_event_id = '{{ $json.source_event_id }}'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.contributor_id }}', 'None')::UUID,
  '{{ $json.source_system }}',
  '{{ $json.source_event_id }}',
  '{{ $json.email }}',
  '{{ $json.processed_at }}'::TIMESTAMPTZ,
  '{{ $json.processed_at_pst }}'::TIMESTAMPTZ,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.tier_name }}', ''),
  {{ $json.presentment_amount || 0 }},
  '{{ $json.presentment_currency }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.usd_amount }}', 'None')::NUMERIC,
  {{ $json.normalized_usd || 0 }},
  '{{ $json.billing_period }}'
ON CONFLICT (source_system, source_charge_id) DO NOTHING;

=-- Update cursor only after successful persist (idempotent pull)
INSERT INTO pipeline_state (key, value, updated_at)
VALUES ('skool_last_pull', '{{ $json._cursor_ts }}', NOW())
ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE
SET value = EXCLUDED.value, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE EXCLUDED.value > pipeline_state.value;

nodes.name: Update Skool Cursor
nodes.notes: Only advances the cursor if the new timestamp is later than the stored one. Safe to re-run — the WHERE clause prevents regression.

parameters.pythonCode:
from datetime import date

response = _items[0]["json"]
rates = response.get("rates", {})
if not rates and "data" in response:
    rates = response["data"].get("rates", {})
rate_date = response.get("date", date.today().isoformat())

result = []
for currency, rate in rates.items():
    if currency == "USD":
        continue
    foreign_to_usd = (1 / rate) if rate > 0 else 0
    result.append({"json": {
        "rate_date": rate_date,
        "currency_from": currency,
        "rate": f"{foreign_to_usd:.6f}",
        "source": "exchangerate.host"
    }})

return result if result else [{"json": {"skip": True}}]

parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO exchange_rates (rate_date, currency_from, currency_to, rate, source)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.rate_date }}'::DATE,
  '{{ $json.currency_from }}',
  'USD',
  {{ $json.rate }},
  '{{ $json.source }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (rate_date, currency_from, currency_to) DO UPDATE
SET rate = EXCLUDED.rate, ingested_at = NOW();
